title: Sayings of Bayazid Bastami: The Drunken Saint
description: The ecstatic sayings of Bayazid Bastami, who proclaimed 'Glory be to me! How great is my majesty!' — the first Sufi to claim total annihilation in God.
introduction: The ecstatic sayings of Bayazid Bastami, who proclaimed 'Glory be to me! How great is my majesty!' — the first Sufi to claim total annihilation in God.

translation.text: He was asked: 'How did you reach this state?' He said: 'I shed my self as a snake sheds its skin. Then I looked at myself, and I was Him.'
